sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_soap_requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, request_body VARCHAR(255), response_body VARCHAR(255) NULL);
SELECT id, soap_server(request_body) || '<response>Processed</response>' AS full_response FROM test_soap_requests WHERE response_body IS NULL;

SELECT id, soap_server(request_body) AS response, LENGTH(soap_server(request_body) || '<response>Processed</response>') AS response_length FROM test_soap_requests GROUP BY id HAVING response_length > 50;
CREATE TABLE test_responses (id INT PRIMARY KEY, response_data XML NOT NULL);
SELECT t.id, soap_server(t.request_body) || ROWNUM AS combined FROM test_soap_requests t INNER JOIN test_responses r ON r.id = t.id WHERE r.response_data IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, soap_server(request_body) AS response FROM test_soap_requests WHERE request_body IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, response FROM temp_test ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT id, soap_server(request_body || '<extra_data>') AS combined_response FROM test_soap_requests WHERE request_body IS NOT NULL AND request_body <> '';
